name: @antodevs/groundtruth
description: Lightweight Node.js proxy to intercept API requests from coding agents and inject fresh web context
author: Anto

scripts.release: git add -u && git commit -m "chore: auto-commit before release" || true && npm version patch && npm run build && git push origin main --tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: git add -u && git commit -m "chore: auto-commit before release" || true && npm version minor && npm run build && git push origin main --tags && npm publish
